paper: Ortiz et al. - 2026 - Real-Time Digital Twin Architecture for Immersive Industrial Automation Training
tema_nombre: Evidencia Empírica de Resultados de Aprendizaje, Aceptación y Engagement Estudiantil
valor_extraido: N total: 32, perfil: estudiantes de ingeniería de octavo semestre del programa de Ingeniería Mecatrónica de la Universidad de las Fuerzas Armadas ESPE, con cursos previos en sistemas de control, programación de PLC y automatización industrial.
cita_textual: The educational intervention involved a total of 32 undergraduate engineering students enrolled in the course 'PLCs and Industrial Networks' of the Mechatronics Engineering program at the Universidad de las Fuerzas Armadas ESPE. All participants were in the eighth semester of the program and followed an identical curricular pathway. Prior to the intervention, the students had successfully completed foundational courses in control systems, PLC programming, and industrial automation.

paper: Ortiz et al. - 2026 - Real-Time Digital Twin Architecture for Immersive Industrial Automation Training
tema_nombre: Evidencia Empírica de Resultados de Aprendizaje, Aceptación y Engagement Estudiantil
valor_extraido: SUS, NASA-TLX, pruebas prácticas y evaluaciones conceptuales cortas

paper: Ortiz et al. - 2026 - Real-Time Digital Twin Architecture for Immersive Industrial Automation Training
tema_nombre: Evidencia Empírica de Resultados de Aprendizaje, Aceptación y Engagement Estudiantil
valor_extraido: Mejora en comprensión conceptual: grupo tradicional 58%, grupo Digital Twin 85% (diferencia de 27 puntos porcentuales); mejora en detección de errores: grupo tradicional 50%, grupo Digital Twin 82% (diferencia de 32 puntos porcentuales)
cita_textual: For conceptual understanding, the traditional group achieved 58%, compared with 85% in the Digital Twin group, corresponding to a 27-point improvement. Error detection performance also improved significantly, increasing from 50% in the traditional group to 82% with the Digital Twin environment, representing a 32-point advantage.
ubicacion: Sección 4.4.2. Comparison with Traditional Teaching Approaches (página 21)

paper: Ortiz et al. - 2026 - Real-Time Digital Twin Architecture for Immersive Industrial Automation Training
tema_nombre: Evidencia Empírica de Resultados de Aprendizaje, Aceptación y Engagement Estudiantil
valor_extraido: Mejora en control operacional: grupo tradicional 62%, grupo Digital Twin 88% (diferencia de 26 puntos porcentuales); tiempo promedio de finalización de tarea: 92 s; reducción del 32% en errores operacionales; tasa de precisión del 93%
cita_textual: In terms of operational control, the traditional group obtained an average score of 62%, while the Digital Twin group reached 88%, representing a difference of 26 percentage points. Operationally, the average task completion time was 92 s, with a 32% reduction in operational errors and a 93% accuracy rate in the executed actions.
ubicacion: Secciones 4.4.1. Usability and Performance Testing (página 20) y 4.4.2. Comparison with Traditional Teaching Approaches (página 21)

paper: Ortiz et al. - 2026 - Real-Time Digital Twin Architecture for Immersive Industrial Automation Training
tema_nombre: Evidencia Empírica de Resultados de Aprendizaje, Aceptación y Engagement Estudiantil
valor_extraido: SUS: 86/100 (excelente); NASA-TLX: 34/100 (bajo a moderado); Usabilidad: M=4.7, SD=0.4; Interacción: M=4.6, SD=0.5; Inmersión: M=4.4, SD=0.6; Motivación: M=4.3, SD=0.6; Aprendizaje activo: grupo tradicional 55%, grupo Digital Twin 90% (diferencia de 35 puntos porcentuales); Confianza: grupo tradicional 60%, grupo Digital Twin 87% (diferencia de 27 puntos porcentuales)
cita_textual: The SUS score reached an average of 86/100, corresponding to an 'excellent' level of usability. The cognitive workload measured with NASA-TLX was 34/100, reflecting a low-to-moderate level suitable for automation-related activities. Usability achieved the highest score (M = 4.7, SD = 0.4). active learning indicators showed a notable increase, with values rising from 55% in the traditional approach to 90% in the Digital Twin-based environment, reflecting a 35-point difference. confidence in executing industrial tasks increased from 60% to 87%, corresponding to a 27-point improvement.

cita_textual: The experimental evaluation was conducted with a single cohort of undergraduate engineering students and focused on two representative industrial processes. Although these processes reflect common automation scenarios, the sample size and case-study scope limit the statistical generalizability of the findings. In addition, the current implementation relies on Siemens-based automation hardware, which may constrain direct replication in environments using alternative industrial platforms.

paper: Ortiz et al. - 2026 - Real-Time Digital Twin Architecture for Immersive Industrial Automation Training

valor_extraido: Muchos enfoques se basan en modelos completamente simulados sin acoplamiento en tiempo real con controladores físicos industriales como PLC. Otros enfatizan la visualización inmersiva sin descripciones detalladas de las capas de comunicación o mecanismos de sincronización.
cita_textual: Many approaches rely on fully simulated models without real-time coupling to physical industrial controllers such as PLCs. Others emphasize immersive visualization without detailed architectural descriptions of communication layers or synchronization mechanisms.

paper: Ortiz et al. - 2026 - Real-Time Digital Twin Architecture for Immersive Industrial Automation Training

valor_extraido: El marco prioriza plataformas de control y visualización industriales ampliamente adoptadas para facilitar la replicación en laboratorios académicos con diferentes restricciones de recursos y admite escalamiento incremental hacia procesos más complejos, mayor número de usuarios o funcionalidades de monitoreo extendidas.
cita_textual: the proposed framework prioritizes widely adopted industrial control and visualization platforms that are representative of real-world automation practice. This design choice facilitates replication in academic laboratories with different resource constraints and supports incremental scaling toward more complex processes, a higher number of users, or extended monitoring functionalities without requiring fundamental architectural modifications.

valor_extraido: The proposed architecture is based on OPC UA communication, which enables the integration of multiple devices and systems within a unified framework. The use of KEPServerEX further supports extensibility, allowing additional devices—such as robotic systems (e.g., WLKATA Mirobot)—to be incorporated into the digital twin environment without fundamental architectural changes. However, increasing system scale also introduces higher system complexity, particularly in terms of tag management, communication configuration, and data consistency.
cita_textual: From a scalability perspective, the proposed architecture is based on OPC UA communication, which enables the integration of multiple devices and systems within a unified framework. The use of KEPServerEX further supports extensibility, allowing additional devices—such as robotic systems (e.g., WLKATA Mirobot)—to be incorporated into the digital twin environment without fundamental architectural changes. However, increasing system scale also introduces higher system complexity, particularly in terms of tag management, communication configuration, and data consistency.
